name: Mutexium
description: It seems as though only one entity can hold this piece of raw mutexium at any one time. How did you get your hands on this?

name: Iron Ore
description: Raw and impure iron. It needs to be refined at a smelter before it can be worked.

name: Iron Ingot
description: A refined and workable iron ingot. It can be made into many different things.

name: Steel Ingot
description: An alloy of iron and carbon that is more resistant than pure iron.

name: Coal
description: A hunk of raw carbon. Add this to iron to make it stronger.
